auditRequests.metaRootCause: CX lacks self-service audit trail visibility - 41 of 45 tickets (91%) are requests for change logs because CX cannot determine who/when settings changed

propagationDelays.metaRootCause: Data propagation/sync delays - updates in one system not reflecting in another in a timely manner

clusters.name: SPO (Sponsored Results) Audit Requests
clusters.rootCause: Providers dispute SPO activation/changes and request logs to identify who enabled the feature. CX lacks visibility into change history, requiring QA triage to pull logs. Most resolved as 'Working as Intended' - providers activated it themselves.
symptoms: Provider denies enabling SPO
Provider charged for SPO unexpectedly
Request for activation logs/timestamps
Request for user who made changes
sampleSummaries: SPO logs request - practice requests exact date/time SPO was activated and IP address
Request for SPO activation logs - Provider claims she never activated this
SPO booking when SPO was off - PR received SPO booking when she said SPO was off

clusters.name: Visit Reason (VR) Change Audit Requests
clusters.rootCause: Providers receive bookings for visit reasons they claim not to support, and request logs to prove when VRs were added/removed. Lack of visible audit trail in CX tools. Most resolved as 'Working as Intended' - VRs were correctly configured at booking time.
symptoms: Provider received booking for VR they don't service
Request for VR add/remove timestamps
VRs allegedly repopulated on their own
VRs allegedly removed without authorization
sampleSummaries: Visit reason history needed - when added/removed + source of change (Asthma / Neuropsych Eval)
Inaccurate Booking - Practice believes they removed ADHD VR and it repopulated
VRs were removed from provider - Reports all VRs were removed, has since added them back

clusters.name: Insurance Settings Audit Requests
clusters.rootCause: Providers receive bookings for insurances they claim not to accept, or dispute OON settings. Request logs to identify who changed insurance settings. CX lacks visibility into insurance change history.
symptoms: Provider received booking for insurance they don't accept
Request for insurance change logs
Accept OON setting allegedly changed without authorization
Insurance plan allegedly removed but bookings still came through
sampleSummaries: Insurance settings log - request for log of changes to Accept out of network setting
Provider got booking for insurance he doesn't have listed - verify if Apple Health was in list
Insurances Changes - Practice claiming Zocdoc user made unauthorized changes to insurance setup

clusters.name: Calendar/Availability Audit Requests
clusters.rootCause: Providers claim OOO blocks or busy blocks were added/removed without their knowledge, or availability changed unexpectedly. Request logs to identify who made changes. Bookings occur during times provider thought were blocked.
symptoms: OOO block allegedly removed without authorization
Busy blocks added without provider knowledge
Availability/time slots created without authorization
Request for calendar change audit logs
sampleSummaries: busy blocks added, poc unsure by who - busy blocks were added blocking previous availability
OOO Blocked Removed - practice asking when and by whom OOO was removed from calendar
Incorrect Appointment Time Slots Created - manual calendar showed slots they didn't add

clusters.name: Spend/Budget Management Audit Requests
clusters.rootCause: Providers dispute spend caps, budget changes, or claim bookings came through when spend was off. Request logs to verify timing of settings changes. CX cannot self-service these audits.
symptoms: Unexpected spend cap on account
Budget reverted to previous value
Booking came through when spend was off
Request for spend change logs
sampleSummaries: Unexpected $50,000 spend cap on enterprise account - does not know how or by whom it was added
Logs Of Provider Turning Off Spend - received appointment after turning off spend
Budget Tool - Confirmed budget saved as 50K but reverted back to 80K

clusters.name: Working Hours Change Disputes
clusters.rootCause: Provider working hours changed unexpectedly, leading to bookings during unavailable times. Request for audit of who changed working hours.
symptoms: Working hours changed without authorization
Bookings during times WH were removed
Request for WH change logs
sampleSummaries: PR removed WH but times still booked - stated she removed all WH but appointments were still booked
Provider Working Hours Incorrect - unexplained schedule changes causing major scheduling disruption

clusters.name: Google/Partner Settings Audit Requests
clusters.rootCause: Providers claim 'Bookings from Google and others' setting keeps reverting or was changed without authorization. Request logs to identify who changed the setting.
symptoms: Google booking setting keeps reverting to enabled
Provider claims never enabled Google bookings
Request for setting change audit logs
sampleSummaries: Google Business Profile - POC turned off Bookings from Google multiple times but it keeps turning back on
PR requesting to see who changed Bookings from Google and others practice-level setting

unclustered.summary: Zocdoc Mapping Pin- Can we move the location?
Unable to access Virtual Visit logs for past Video Visit

propagationDelayTickets.summary: Incorrect VR showing up on PFS
The provider updated her VRs and they are not updating on pt side
DSP status showing inactive for active MD Mardiney opp
DEC invoice not able to load and DEC Appointment Report not loading

propagationDelayClusters.name: VR Propagation
propagationDelayClusters.rootCause: VR updates not propagating to patient-facing pages, search, or FAQ sections in a timely manner

propagationDelayClusters.name: Salesforce Sync
propagationDelayClusters.rootCause: Status/case sync between Pulse and Salesforce failing or delayed

propagationDelayClusters.name: Availability Propagation
propagationDelayClusters.rootCause: Marketplace availability activation not syncing properly

propagationDelayClusters.name: Profile Media Updates
propagationDelayClusters.rootCause: Profile media (headshots) not updating due to caching

propagationDelayClusters.name: Billing/Reports Loading
propagationDelayClusters.rootCause: Invoice and appointment report generation/loading failures
